The buyer is asking you, what are the rates? We use every lender in the state, including every credit union. Who do you use? We have access to everyone and including the people you use now. Look, there's only a couple of people in town cheaper than your lender. Sign right here and I'll look at all our other options. In those cases, we go back to your present lender.
